name: chrY_Yp11_2_X_transposed_region
description: Yp11.2 hosts the X-transposed region (XTR) on Y: ~3.4 Mb block transposed from Xq21 to Y after the human-chimp split (~5 Mya). Includes PCDH11Y and TGIF2LY, X-Y paralogs that have undergone partial gene loss on Y. >98% identity to chrX donor; major source of X-Y mapping confusion.

architecture.internal_structure: Single-copy on Y, mirrors Xq21 XTR; PCDH11Y, TGIF2LY; gene degradation in pseudogene fragments.

related_diseases: X-Y misalignment artefacts in variant callers
